programmes.show_description: Refresh your wardrobe with effortless new-season style from White Stuff. Discover easy layers and everyday essentials designed to bring comfort and confidence to spring dressing.
New Season Sandals.
Join designer Kim Mendelson as she presents her latest lines. Daytime chic to evening sophistication, weekend comfort to party glamour, the Kim & Co collection is designed for every aspect of life.
Refresh your wardrobe with the Wallis Fashion Collection. Discover stylish, versatile pieces perfect for every occasion and elevate your everyday look with ease.
Style your garden with the help of My Garden Stories, offering an incredible range of outdoor furniture, planters and sculptures to make your space your very own.

programmes.show_name: Fashion on Friday with Kim & Co
programmes.show_description: Showcasing great colours, quality fabrics, exciting shapes and free fashion advice. Our ranges are made for real women who demand good quality, realistic prices and clothes that look and feel great!
